attributes.title: Kickoff Meeting — Project Horizon
action_items: James Tan to set up Databricks workspace on TechCorp Cloud by 25 January
Marcus Lee to produce Unity Catalog governance baseline by 30 January
Sarah Chen to deliver architecture design document by 5 February

attributes.summary: Project scope confirmed with three deliverables as approved; NorthWind alignment confirmed with 2026 data strategy
attributes.context: Priya walked through the three deliverables in the approved scope document. Jun Park confirmed alignment with NorthWind's 2026 data strategy. No changes requested.

attributes.summary: Technical approach approved: Databricks on TechCorp Cloud, Unity Catalog for governance, bronze/silver/gold layering, Power BI service for reports
attributes.context: Sarah presented the target architecture. Li Wei requested disaster recovery details to be covered in the architecture design document.

attributes.description: Databricks, Unity Catalog, cloud data platform design

attributes.description: Unity Catalog governance baseline

attributes.label: Infrastructure & Data Governance

attributes.title: Steering Committee — Project Horizon
action_items: Sarah Chen: revised architecture design document by 20 February
James Tan: DataCorp Cloud provisioning complete by 17 February
Priya Ramesh: update Risk Register to reflect new vendor

attributes.summary: Approved scope revision to add fourth deliverable: data-quality monitoring with automated freshness checks, schema drift detection, and Power BI alerting
attributes.context: Mid-engagement checkpoint review; identified as strategic priority for 2026
attributes.outcome: Scope expanded from three to four deliverables

attributes.summary: Extended final delivery date from 15 March 2026 to 30 March 2026
attributes.context: Extension required due to expanded scope with fourth deliverable
attributes.outcome: All parties accepted new target of 30 March 2026

attributes.summary: Changed Databricks cluster vendor from TechCorp Cloud to DataCorp Cloud for 23% annualised cost savings
attributes.context: Pricing quote review completed 5 February; DataCorp reserved-instance pricing more favorable
attributes.outcome: DataCorp Cloud selected; Sarah Chen and James Tan assigned to manage migration

attributes.label: Data Quality
attributes.description: Data quality monitoring and validation

attributes.summary: Data-quality monitoring mapped onto new silver-layer job set
attributes.context: Steering committee decision from 10 Feb to add data-quality monitoring as one of four deliverables
attributes.outcome: Four deliverables confirmed with added scope complexity

attributes.summary: Revise final delivery date to 30 March 2026
attributes.context: Timeline adjustment made during steering review

attributes.description: DataCorp Cloud platform with Databricks and medallion architecture

attributes.description: Power BI reports for operations, executive, and finance

attributes.summary: Mitigate vendor lock-in with DataCorp Cloud via exit strategy and 90-day termination clause
attributes.context: Non-standard procurement for NorthWind creates vendor lock-in risk
attributes.outcome: Document exit strategy; negotiate 90-day termination clause

attributes.summary: Address Marcus Lee departure handover gap with formal documentation and parallel run
attributes.context: Marcus Lee departure on 7 March creates handover risk
attributes.outcome: Formal handover document; 2-week parallel run with James Tan

attributes.summary: Scope expansion (data-quality monitoring) may impact 30 March deadline
attributes.context: Medium likelihood, Medium impact. Weekly burndown review and descope candidates identified.

attributes.summary: Prevent Unity Catalog permissions drift between dev and prod
attributes.context: Permissions drift between dev and prod environments

attributes.summary: SAP source-system availability during ingestion peaks
attributes.context: Medium likelihood, Medium impact. Incremental ingestion and 4-hour RPO tolerance agreed.

attributes.summary: Power BI capacity SKU insufficient at full volume
attributes.context: Low likelihood, Medium impact. Capacity metrics app deployed and upgrade path priced.

attributes.summary: Data residency — DataCorp Cloud SG region confirmed
attributes.context: Low likelihood, High impact. Contractual confirmation in MSA and residency clause reviewed.

attributes.summary: Knowledge transfer insufficient given compressed timeline
attributes.context: Medium likelihood, High impact. Runbook-first documentation and video walkthroughs recorded.

attributes.summary: Revert to original project scope with three deliverables and TechCorp Cloud vendor

attributes.outcome: Deliverables reduced to 3, final delivery date reverted to 15 March 2026, cloud vendor changed to TechCorp Cloud
